sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112820" key="fwlhth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φωλ-ητήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place of secret assembly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
